title: Smoky Show-off Jamaican Shrimp Paste Stir-fry
description: A show-off dish featuring smoky shrimp paste in a crunchy texture and suitable for those with fodmap concerns.

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: For a crunchy texture and smokiness

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: To add flavor without being overpowering

ingredients.name: Smoky Paprika
ingredients.notes: For added depth of flavor and smokiness

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add sesame seeds to the hot oil and stir until they begin to toast and become golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Fold in shrimp paste and garlic powder, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
Sprinkle smoked paprika over the mixture and cook for another minute or so until well combined and fragrant.
Serve immediately as a side dish or main course.
